description_long: This is a square, multi-layered chocolate cake with three visible layers of chocolate sponge separated by thick, creamy white filling. The top surface is dusted with a light layer of cocoa powder and is adorned with generous chocolate shavings, giving it a rich and indulgent appearance. The cake's edges are slightly irregular, suggesting a soft, moist texture rather than a rigid, perfectly shaped dessert. The creamy filling appears to be whipped, possibly mascarpone or whipped cream, and is evenly distributed between the layers. The chocolate shavings on top are curled and scattered, adding a decorative and appetizing touch. There is no visible plate or container beneath the cake, and it is presented as a standalone dessert.
description: A square, three-layer chocolate cake with creamy white filling and chocolate shavings on top. The cake looks moist, rich, and is dusted with cocoa powder.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the chocolate shavings on top and the distinct layering of chocolate sponge and cream.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the even distribution of cream and the generous chocolate shavings on the top surface.
description_view_2: Back view with a clear look at the cake's square shape and the thick, creamy layers between the chocolate sponge.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the slightly irregular edges and the layered structure of the cake.
